overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing through Night City. The character walks along sunny sidewalks, passes through a dark overpass, and runs through neon-lit urban streets with dense futuristic architecture and moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial sidewalk with dedicated bike lane

events.description: cyclist with blue hair rides past the camera from behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk through a sunny futuristic commercial district

notable_agents.action: cyclist with distinctive blue hair riding past the camera

entered.detail: tall glass and steel buildings with neon accents forming the city skyline
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
dedicated red asphalt bicycle lane separated by metal railings
orange safety barriers separating sidewalk from bike lane

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic commercial district. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a red bike lane, with tall glass skyscrapers and palm trees visible ahead. Various pedestrians walk in both directions, and a cyclist with blue hair passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: character walks under a large concrete overpass entering a shaded corridor
character with red mohawk passes close to camera on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the dark overpass, navigating through scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with red mohawk and white shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the street
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overpass structure
metal drainage grates embedded in the sidewalk surface
teal and yellow storefront with 'PAWNSHOP' signage visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows with the sky mostly blocked overhead. The ground features metal storm drains, and the pawn shop becomes visible ahead on the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions through the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning from covered to open

events.description: character exits the covered overpass back into open street with visible sky
character transitions from walking to running pace

agents.ego_description: exiting the overpass and accelerating from walking to running through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: person with green hair and red athletic wear walking toward camera

entered.detail: bright colorful advertising holograms and digital screens lining the street ahead
modern reflective glass facade building with multiple stories
short black and yellow posts lining the edge of the sidewalk
stacked cardboard boxes and debris along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark overpass into a brighter commercial street lined with neon holographic billboards. The pawn shop passes by on the right as the character accelerates from walking to running. The street features glass office buildings on the left and scattered cardboard boxes on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with neon signage and street markets

events.description: character runs across a marked intersection with crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: running at full speed through the narrow urban canyon, navigating past pedestrians and obstacles

entered.detail: large industrial air conditioning units mounted on building exterior
neon signs and banners stretching across the street between buildings
tall stacks of cardboard boxes and shipping materials piled on the sidewalk
yellow and black striped barriers blocking off part of the street

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow urban canyon flanked by tall buildings on both sides. External AC units and stacked cardboard boxes line the right side of the street, while overhead neon signage creates a canopy of lights. The lighting is diffused by the tall structures, and the character navigates past construction barriers in the center of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic commercial district that transitions from a bright, open boulevard into a dense, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins on a sunny concrete sidewalk beside a red bike lane, moving past palm trees and glass skyscrapers as pedestrians and a blue-haired cyclist pass by. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into the heavy shadows of a massive concrete overpass, where the open sky is replaced by a covered walkway and metal storm drains. The camera then emerges from the darkness into a brighter street lined with holographic billboards, accelerating from a walk to a run as a pawn shop recedes to the right. Finally, the path narrows into a deep urban corridor flanked by tall buildings and overhead neon signage, navigating past construction barriers and stacked cardboard boxes under a canopy of diffused light.
